_comment: Render-parity reference for the Cohere2 / Command R7B checkpoint's OWN `default` chat template (no macMLX override needed). Generated by docs/reference/capture_cohere2_chat_template.py (jinja2, trim_blocks + lstrip_blocks + keep_trailing_newline, cross-checked == transformers apply_chat_template). Cohere2ChatTemplateParityTests renders `template` through swift-jinja and asserts equality with each case's `expected`, proving swift-jinja parses the whole named `default` template (incl. the off-path tool/RAG macros) and renders the standard conversation path natively. The tool/RAG (`documents`) branch is off the generation path and intentionally not covered.
